entry_rule: SELL credit call spread near mid on pullup day (trend down).
exit_rule: TP: buy back at 50% max profit (spread≈0.25); SL: buy back if spread≥0.99 OR close>EMA21 (≈12.56); Time-stop: exit by 21 days.
